case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SHIRLEY REIMER ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 18008019) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, SHIRLEY AKA SHIRLEY L. REIMER
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-30-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-30-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100030118), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, SHIRLEY AKA SHIRLEY L. REIMER

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT REIMER, SHIRLEY AKA SHIRLEY L. REIMER DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-28-2018
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62569138)
